history.subject: Div base change: reduce ker-pullback to one monomorphism
Milne 3.3 substeps: fibre-irreducible slice existence (2-topo-a) and Krull-Hauptidealsatz diagonal transport (4b), axiom-clean
docstring: correct difference-map corollary cross-reference in Milne 3.3 substeps

Wire the Albanese Pic⁰ bundle to the abelian-variety substrate. Over an algebraically closed base, a smooth scheme is geometrically reduced (base-change each test field to its algebraic closure, where smoothness forces reducedness, then descend along the faithfully flat projection since a flat local hom of local rings is faithfully flat hence injective); combined with geometric irreducibility this yields GeometricallyIntegral of the curve. A smooth geometrically irreducible curve over k̄ has a k̄-rational point (nonempty Jacobson space has a closed point, promoted to a section via pointEquivClosedPoint), discharging HasRationalPoint. These bridges replace the opaque Pic0.bundle sorry with an honest construction reading off Scheme.Pic0.{grpObj,proper,smooth,geometricallyIrreducible}; residual sorryAx is inherited only from the tracked upstream Pic0 smooth/proper and the FGA representability sorry.
Serre twist O(m): concrete compatible-family condition (Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m·sᵢ|_V = sⱼ|_V
Chart sections of Proj ℤ[X] are the degree-zero localization Away Xᵢ

Sync blueprint to wave-1 closures: Quot-scheme representability restated faithfully (projective pi carrying very ample L via IsProjectiveWith, coherent E) with the single Nitsure-endgame sorry now honestly recorded; relative-divisor base change gains the quasi-coherence hypothesis on E (Stacks 01LA removability as a remark) plus the Stacks 00HL flat-cokernel brick, the kernel-pullback comparison map, and chart-shrink lemmas; global sections of a glued sheaf of modules recorded (compatible-family submodule, product/equalizer section computations, pullback-is-pushforward-of-the-inverse) and specialized to the Serre twist; Stacks 02KE H^0 flat base change over a compatible affine pair closed, with its abstract module-theoretic equalizer ladder recorded separately.

Sync blueprint: IdentityComponent.isFiniteTypeGeometricallyIrreducible proof recorded (Kleiman 5.1(3)(c): closed-point translation over the algebraic closure by the inherited group law, Jacobson density, EGA I 6.1.10 for irreducibility, a multiplication-image trick for quasi-compactness, then descent along the base-change isomorphism) -- drops the stale claim that this needed EGA IV_2 4.6.1 input; chapter status prose updated to record the closure.

Fix stale blueprint claim that Mathlib lacks an etale Grothendieck topology on schemes (v4.31 provides AlgebraicGeometry.etaleTopology); the chapter's rational-point route around etale sheafification remains a deliberate simplification, not a workaround for a Mathlib gap.

Register the wave-2 leaf modules (SchematicSupport, TensorSectionFormula, Milne33Substeps) in the root import list and resolve the pullbackIsoPushforwardInv name collision: the SerreTwistSections morphism-flavoured left-adjoint-uniqueness iso is renamed pullbackIsoPushforwardInvOfIsIso, keeping the pre-existing iso-argument version in Cohomology/AffinePushPullEssImage. Full library build green (8673 jobs).
